agbPage.subtitle: Terms and conditions for studio services
agbPage.intro: These terms govern appointments, services, payment, and aftercare at Medusa Tattoo & Piercing Studio. By booking, you confirm that you have read the guidance on health, care, and age verification. If you have questions, we will clarify the details before your appointment.

payment.title: § 4 Pricing, deposits & payment
payment.body: Prices depend on size, style, placement, and effort. For larger projects we may require a deposit, which will be credited toward the final price. Payments can be made in cash, by card, or by bank transfer upon agreement.

cancellation.title: § 5 Rescheduling & no-shows
cancellation.body: Appointments are binding. Please notify us early if you need to reschedule so we can release the slot. For late cancellations or no-shows, we reserve the right to charge a cancellation fee.

design.title: § 6 Design approval & changes
design.body: Designs are created individually and reviewed before your appointment. Minor adjustments are part of the consultation; extensive changes may require additional time or costs. Design rights remain with the studio until full payment is completed.

health.title: § 7 Health, disclosure & age verification
health.body: Clients confirm that no medical reasons prevent the treatment and that relevant conditions or allergies have been disclosed in advance. We do not treat minors; a valid photo ID must be shown upon request.

dispute.title: § 8 Dispute resolution & jurisdiction
dispute.body: German law applies. The place of jurisdiction is Munich where legally permissible. We are not obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

scope: (1) These General Terms and Conditions (GTC) apply to all services offered by MEDUSA TATTOO MUNICH, Altheimer Eck 11, 80331 Munich, hereinafter referred to as the "Provider".
(2) The GTC apply to contracts for tattoo and piercing services between the Provider and the customer (consumer or business).
(3) Deviating conditions of the customer are not recognised unless the Provider expressly agrees to their validity in writing.
services: (1) The Provider offers tattoo and piercing services.
(2) The services include consultation, tattooing and piercing, as well as aftercare advice.
(3) All services are carried out in accordance with current hygienic standards and legal regulations.
appointments: (1) Appointments can be made online via the website or by telephone.
(2) No costs are incurred if cancelled up to 24 hours before the appointment.
(3) In the event of short-term cancellation (less than 24 hours) or no-show, a cancellation fee of 50% of the agreed price will be charged.
pricing: (1) Prices are based on effort, size and complexity of the service.
(2) Payments can be made in cash, by debit card or credit card.
(3) A deposit may be required for larger projects.
health: (1) The customer warrants that they are medically fit for the service.
(2) If there are doubts about suitability, the Provider may refuse the service.
(3) The customer is obliged to disclose any pre-existing conditions and medications.
aftercare: (2) The Provider assumes no liability for consequences of improper aftercare.
(3) Liability is limited to intent and gross negligence.
copyright: (1) Designs by the Provider are protected by copyright.
(2) Commercial use of tattoo designs requires written consent.
(3) Customer designs remain the property of the customer.
privacy: (1) The processing of personal data is carried out in accordance with GDPR.
(2) Details can be found in the separate privacy policy.
(3) The customer has the right to information, rectification and erasure of their data.
final: (2) The place of jurisdiction is Munich.
(3) Amendments and supplements to these GTC require written form. This also applies to the amendment of this written form clause.
(4) Oral ancillary agreements do not exist.

contentLiability.title: Liability for Content
contentLiability.text: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with § 7 para. 1 TMG under general law. According to §§ 8 to 10 TMG, however, we are not obliged as a service provider to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity.

linkLiability.title: Liability for Links
linkLiability.text: Our offer contains links to external websites of third parties, on whose contents we have no influence. Therefore we cannot assume any liability for these external contents. The respective provider or operator of the pages is always responsible for the contents of the linked pages.

copyrightNotice.title: Copyright
copyrightNotice.paragraph1: All images, texts and graphic designs used on this website are protected by copyright. Reproduction, editing, distribution and any kind of use outside the limits of copyright law require the written consent of the respective author or creator.
copyrightNotice.paragraph2: Insofar as the content on this page was not created by the operator, the copyrights of third parties are respected. Should you nevertheless become aware of a copyright infringement, we ask for a corresponding notice.

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.subtitle: Answers about appointments, pricing, hygiene and aftercare.

howToBook.question: How do I book an appointment?
howToBook.answer: Use our online form or call us directly. We typically confirm requests within 24 hours.

reschedule.question: Can I reschedule my appointment?
reschedule.answer: Yes. Please let us know at least 48 hours in advance so we can arrange a new time.

deposit.question: Is a deposit required?
deposit.answer: For larger projects we may require a deposit. We will confirm the details during your consultation.

pricing.question: How are prices calculated?
pricing.answer: Pricing depends on size, placement, complexity and style. You will receive a clear estimate before booking.

paymentMethods.question: Which payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.answer: We accept cash, card payments and bank transfer.

hygiene.question: What hygiene standards do you follow?
hygiene.answer: We use sterile single-use materials, certified disinfection procedures and documented hygiene routines.

inkSafety.question: Are inks and materials safe?
inkSafety.answer: We use tested pigments and implant-grade jewellery. We discuss allergies and sensitivities beforehand.

chooseArtist.question: How do I choose the right artist?
chooseArtist.answer: Share your ideas and references and we will recommend the artist whose portfolio best matches your style.

styles.question: Which styles do you offer?
styles.answer: We work in realism, fineline, blackwork, neo-traditional, Japanese, and custom concepts.

care.question: How do I care for my tattoo or piercing?
care.answer: You receive a detailed aftercare guide. We explain each step and answer your questions on site.

problems.question: What should I do if I have an issue?
problems.answer: Contact us immediately. We will advise you or arrange a follow-up appointment.

directions.question: How do I find the studio?
directions.answer: We are at Altheimer Eck 11, just steps from Marienplatz. U-Bahn and S-Bahn connections are nearby.
